name: Reject deleting an asset that has open findings
statusMessage:
XFAIL DELETE asset with open findings returns 500 with stack trace instead of 409 (see issue #3)

AssertionError: assert 500 == <HTTPStatus.CONFLICT: 409>
 +  where 500 = <Response [500 Internal Server Error]>.status_code
 +  and   <HTTPStatus.CONFLICT: 409> = HTTPStatus.CONFLICT

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(reason='DELETE asset with open findings returns 500 with stack trace instead of 409 (see issue #3)', strict=True)
